seo.title: Tony's Remodeling | Expert Handyman Services in Irving, TX | (214) 874-0038
seo.description: Tony's Remodeling offers reliable handyman services in Irving, TX. From minor repairs to major remodels, we deliver quality workmanship. Call (214) 874-0038 for a free estimate.

hero.headline: Expert Handyman Services for Your Home & Business
hero.subheadline: From leaky faucets to full kitchen remodels, Tony's Remodeling delivers professional, affordable, and timely solutions you can count on.

featureSections.title: One Call Fixes It All
featureSections.body: Whether it's a squeaky door, drywall repair, or a bathroom renovation, our skilled team handles it all with precision and care. We save you time and hassle by being your single source for home and business repairs.
featureSections.cardBody: From fixing a running toilet to installing ceiling fans, we handle plumbing and electrical tasks safely and efficiently.

featureSections.title: Remodeling That Transforms Your Space
featureSections.body: Thinking of updating your kitchen, bathroom, or basement? Our remodeling services bring your vision to life with attention to detail and a focus on functionality and aesthetics.
bullets: Custom designs tailored to your style
Clean work sites with minimal disruption
featureSections.cardBody: Transform your kitchen or bathroom with custom cabinetry, countertops, tile work, and modern fixtures that add value and comfort.

whyChooseUs.title: Local Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: We know Irving homes and businesses inside out. Our team understands local building codes and common issues, ensuring every job is done right.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Punctual
whyChooseUs.description: We show up on time and finish when promised. No excuses, no delays — just dependable service you can trust.

whyChooseUs.title: Affordable Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: Get top-quality work without breaking the bank. We provide transparent pricing with no hidden fees, and we work within your budget.

whyChooseUs.title: Full-Service Convenience
whyChooseUs.description: From minor fixes to major renovations, we handle it all. You don't need to call multiple contractors — we're your one-stop shop.

testimonials.quote: Tony's team did an amazing job fixing our deck and installing new lighting. Professional, fast, and fair priced. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: We hired Tony's for a bathroom remodel and couldn't be happier. The craftsmanship is top-notch, and they kept the project on schedule.
testimonials.author: Jennifer L.

testimonials.quote: Finally found a handyman who actually calls back and shows up! Tony fixed our leaky pipes and patched the drywall perfectly.
testimonials.author: Carlos M.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free estimate and experience the Tony's Remodeling difference.

servicesPage.intro: At Tony's Remodeling, we offer a full range of handyman services to keep your home or business in top shape. From small repairs to large remodels, our experienced team delivers quality workmanship and outstanding customer service.

services.title: General Handyman Services
services.shortDescription: Reliable repairs and maintenance for every part of your property.
services.longDescription: Our general handyman services cover a wide variety of tasks including drywall repair, painting, furniture assembly, caulking, and more. We fix what's broken and improve what's worn — all with a smile.
benefits: Fast response times for urgent repairs
Skilled in multiple trades — no job too small
Use of premium materials for lasting results

process.title: Inspection & Estimate
process.description: We assess the issue, explain your options, and provide a clear, upfront quote.

process.title: Scheduling
process.description: We work around your schedule and arrive promptly at the agreed time.

process.title: Quality Completion
process.description: We complete the work efficiently, clean up thoroughly, and ensure you're satisfied.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day service?
faqs.answer: Yes, for many common repairs. Call us to check availability.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Irving and surrounding communities in the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex.

services.title: Plumbing Repairs & Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert plumbing solutions for leaks, clogs, and new fixtures.
services.longDescription: From dripping faucets to water heater installations, our licensed plumbers handle residential and commercial plumbing with precision. We diagnose problems quickly and offer durable fixes.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We use cameras and pressure tests to pinpoint the issue without guesswork.

process.title: Repair Plan
process.description: We explain the problem and provide a detailed cost breakdown before starting work.

process.title: Completion & Cleanup
process.description: We complete the repair, test the system, and leave your space spotless.

faqs.question: Can you fix a clogged drain?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use snaking and hydro-jetting to clear even tough clogs.

faqs.question: Do you install water heaters?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install both tank and tankless water heaters from top brands.

services.title: Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Safe and code-compliant electrical work for any project.
services.longDescription: Our electricians handle everything from outlet repairs to panel upgrades. We prioritize safety and ensure all work meets local codes. Whether it's a dimmer switch or whole-house rewiring, we've got you covered.
benefits: Licensed electricians with years of experience

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your electrical needs and check for potential hazards.

process.title: Installation/Repair
process.description: We perform the work using quality components and follow best practices.

process.title: Testing & Verification
process.description: We test every circuit and outlet to ensure everything works perfectly.

faqs.question: Can you install ceiling fans?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install and balance ceiling fans of all styles.

faqs.question: Do you handle electrical panel upgrades?
faqs.answer: Yes, we upgrade panels to increase capacity and improve safety.

services.title: Kitchen & Bath Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your kitchen or bathroom with custom design and expert installation.
services.longDescription: Our remodeling team turns outdated kitchens and baths into stunning, functional spaces. We handle design, demolition, plumbing, electrical, tile, cabinetry, and finishing — all under one roof.
benefits: Custom designs tailored to your lifestyle
Project management from start to finish
Minimal disruption to your daily routine

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We discuss your vision, take measurements, and create a 3D design plan.

process.title: Construction
process.description: Our crew executes the plan with precision, keeping you informed of progress.

process.title: Final Walkthrough
process.description: We review the completed project with you and address any touch-ups.

faqs.question: How long does a bathroom remodel take?
faqs.answer: Typically 2-4 weeks depending on scope. We provide a timeline upfront.

faqs.question: Do you provide materials or do I buy them?
faqs.answer: We can source materials for you or work with items you purchase. We'll guide you on quality and cost.

about.headline: Your Local Handyman with a Commitment to Excellence
about.mission: At Tony's Remodeling, our mission is to provide Irving homeowners and businesses with reliable, high-quality handyman services that make life easier. We believe in honesty, transparency, and craftsmanship.
story: Tony's Remodeling started with a simple idea: give Irving a handyman service that actually cares. With over 20 years of experience in construction and home improvement, our founder Tony saw a need for a company that combines skilled trades with old-fashioned customer service. We built our reputation one job at a time, earning trust through reliability and quality.

Today, we're proud to be a go-to resource for the Irving community. Our team of licensed professionals brings expertise in plumbing, electrical, carpentry, and remodeling. We treat every home like our own and every client like a neighbor. Whether it's a quick fix or a major renovation, we're here to help.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say and stand behind our work. No shortcuts, no excuses.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use the best materials and techniques to ensure lasting results.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and time with the utmost respect, leaving it cleaner than we found it.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve Irving and give back to the community that supports us.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Tony's Remodeling
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call us or fill out the form below for a free, no-obligation estimate.
